name: Use Item
formula: No damage formula. The selected item defines its own effect.
effects: Consumes one selected item when the effect succeeds.
Using an item consumes the current turn.
details: Use Item opens a separate list of consumables that can be used during combat.
Items that would have no effect are rejected by the engine and are not consumed.
This keeps the action menu compact even when the inventory eventually contains many usable items.
